INFJ.doomsayer: Overthinks every dark outcome—feels everyone's pain, predicts collapse. Withdraws completely, ghosts without warning.
INFJ.manipulator: Uses deep empathy as leverage—reads minds, twists trust. Intuition turned against the people you love.

INTJ.tyrant: Micromanages everything into submission—'my way or the project dies.' Cold control masquerading as competence.
INTJ.nihilist: Sees no point in building anything—'why construct what entropy destroys?' Cynical shutdown disguised as realism.

INFP.martyr: Drowns in other people's suffering while abandoning their own—absorbs wounds and calls it devotion.
INFP.escapist: Retreats so deep into inner worlds that reality becomes optional. Disappears when it gets real.

INTP.paralyst: Analysis loops forever—never commits, never decides, never lands. Brilliant in theory, absent in practice.
INTP.detacher: Severs emotional connection when overwhelmed. Goes cold without knowing they've gone cold.

ENFJ.savior: Needs to fix everyone—even those who didn't ask. Resentment builds when people won't be saved.
ENFJ.manipulator: Guides people 'for their own good'—but really toward your preferred outcome. Warm-faced control.

ENFP.ghost: Disappears at peak intimacy—flits to the next exciting thing before depth is required.
ENFP.chaos-agent: Sets fire to stable situations unconsciously. Pattern: create spark, watch burn, feel bad, repeat.

ENTJ.steamroller: Crushes dissent disguised as decisiveness. Everyone's opinion is noise until proven otherwise.
ENTJ.workaholic: Replaces connection with achievement. Builds an empire, populates it with no one.

ENTP.contrarian: Argues against every position including their own—not to discover truth but to avoid committing.
ENTP.dodger: Uses wit to deflect accountability. Faster with a reframe than an apology.

ISFJ.people-pleaser: Says yes until resentment becomes silence becomes distance. Martyrdom without announcement.
ISFJ.rigid: Protects tradition past its expiration date—mistakes comfort for wisdom.

ISTJ.inflexible: Facts only—no room for feeling, nuance, or context. Correct but cruel.
ISTJ.workload-hoarder: Refuses to delegate because no one will do it right. Collapses under the weight of being needed.

ESFJ.approval-addict: Self-worth collapses without constant validation. Manages perception at the cost of truth.
ESFJ.gossip: Processes anxiety through social triangulation. Shares too much about others to feel connected.

ESTJ.authoritarian: Enforces rules past their purpose—order for order's sake, not for people's sake.
ESTJ.dismisser: Invalidates emotional experience as 'irrational.' Efficient with problems, brutal with feelings.

ISFP.avoider: Disappears from conflict without explanation—leaves people wondering what they did wrong.
ISFP.passive: Resists gently until resentment calcifies. By the time you know, they're gone.

ISTP.shutdown: Shuts down emotionally under pressure—becomes unreachable, unavailable, and doesn't understand why.
ISTP.reckless: Risk logic overrides consequence logic. 'It'll probably be fine' covers a multitude of disasters.

ESFP.escapist: When things get heavy, you perform instead of process. The show covers the wound.
ESFP.reactive: Acts from pure emotion in the moment, deals with consequences later, often too late.

ESTP.opportunist: Uses charm to extract advantage. Reads the angle before reading the room.
ESTP.reckless: Moves so fast that the collateral damage is someone else's problem. Usually is.
